note: Frozen contract for the synthetic simulation gate. Single rule: gate_passed => global_verdict=ACCEPT.

gate_rule.description: If the triplet gate (p + CI99% + SESOI + power >= 0.70) passes with n_runs >= 50 for all statistical tests, the synthetic dimension is ACCEPT with full_statistical_support.

canonical_output_files.synthetic_gate: tables/synthetic_gate.json (promoted copy at canonical root, no timestamp in path)

note_on_consumers: dual_proof reads ONLY tables/synthetic_gate.json (promoted canonical root), never globs into timestamped subdirectories.
